Fullname_jp: 三世妖狐 タマモノマエ

transcend.3:
ATK DEF HP +10%
Burst Level 2 Unlocked
transcend.6:
ATK DEF HP +30%
When using <color=#28d9ed>Bite ‘Em, Kitsu!</color> on a Water-type target, inflicts Decreased Attack and Unbuffable on the target for 3 turns
If there is at least 1 other ally, Final DMG taken -30%
transcend.4_1:
ATK DEF HP +16%
+1 Chain Passive Weakness Gauge reduction
+25 Action Points at battle start
At the start of the turn, inflicts Cursed on two random enemies for 1 turn (Irremovable)
transcend.5_1:
ATK DEF HP +22%
Burst Level 3 Unlocked
+100% Effectiveness
Right after attacking, does not trigger an enemy's Counterattack, Revenge, or Agile Response
transcend.3_jp:
ATK DEF HP +10%
バーストスキル2段階解禁
transcend.4_1_jp:
ATK DEF HP +16%
チェーンパッシブのWGダメージ+1
戦闘開始時、AP+25
ターン開始時、ランダムの敵2体に呪い+1ターン (解除不可)
transcend.5_1_jp:
ATK DEF HP +22%
バーストスキル3段階解禁
効果命中+100%
攻撃直後、敵の反撃/復讐/迅速対応発動不可
transcend.6_jp:
ATK DEF HP +30%
水属性対象に<color=#28d9ed>【ポチ、好きにお食べ】</color>使用時、対象の攻撃力DOWN、強化不可+3ターン
自分が一人でない場合、受ける最終ダメージ-30%
transcend.4_1_kr:
ATK DEF HP +16%
체인 패시브의 WG 감소량 +1
입장 시 AP +25
턴 시작 시 무작위 적 2명에게 저주 +1턴 (해제 불가)
transcend.5_1_kr:
ATK DEF HP +22%
버스트 3단계 해금
효과 적중 +100%
공격 직후 적의 반격/복수/신속 대응 불가
transcend.6_kr:
ATK DEF HP +30%
수속성 대상 <color=#28d9ed>나비야, 물어!</color> 사용 시 대상의 공격력 감소, 강화 불가 +3턴
자신이 혼자가 아닌 경우 받는 최종 피해 -30%
transcend.3_zh:
ATK DEF HP +10%
解锁2阶爆发
transcend.4_1_zh:
ATK DEF HP +16%
连携被动效果的WG降低量+1
入场时AP+25
回合开始时，
随机诅咒2名敌人+1回合(无法解除)
transcend.5_1_zh:
ATK DEF HP +22%
解锁3阶爆发
效果命中+100%
攻击后敌人无法
反击/复仇/迅速应对
transcend.6_zh:
ATK DEF HP +30%
对水属性目标使用<color=#28d9ed>小纳比，咬！</color>时，目标攻击力减少、强化不可+3回合
自身不是单独时，受到的最终伤害-30%

true_desc_levels.1:
Attacks an enemy with Heavy Strike.
Has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict Cursed on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. (Irremovable)
true_desc_levels.2:
Attacks an enemy with Heavy Strike.
Has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict Cursed on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. (Irremovable)
true_desc_levels.3:
Attacks an enemy with Heavy Strike.
Has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to inflict Cursed on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. (Irremovable)

true_desc_levels.1: Before using this skill, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.\nAttacks all enemies with Heavy Strike and recovers Chain Points by <color=#28d9ed>15</color>. Then detonates all Cursed stacks on the targets and reduces their Action Points by <color=#28d9ed>80</color>.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: スキル使用前、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n敵全体に強撃でダメージを与え、CPを<color=#28d9ed>15</color>獲得した後、対象の呪いをすべて破裂させ、APを<color=#28d9ed>80</color>DOWNさせる。

true_desc_levels.4_kr: 스킬 사용 전 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.\n적 전체를 강격으로 공격하고 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>15</color> 회복 한뒤 대상의 저주를 모두 폭발시키고, AP를 <color=#28d9ed>80</color> 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.5_kr: 스킬 사용 전 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.\n적 전체를 강격으로 공격하고 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>15</color> 회복 한뒤 대상의 저주를 모두 폭발시키고, AP를 <color=#28d9ed>80</color> 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 使用技能前，对全体敌人附加<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>。\n强击全体敌人，恢复<color=#28d9ed>15</color>的CP。\n攻击后，使目标受到的所有诅咒效果爆炸，AP减少<color=#28d9ed>80</color>。

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Starter Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict irremovable <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>. Applies <color=#28d9ed>Heavy Strike</color> to this attack.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict irremovable <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. Applies <color=#28d9ed>Heavy Strike</color> to this attack.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(初手)</color>：攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象に解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与する。このスキルは<color=#28d9ed>強撃</color>の攻撃判定になる。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>：攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。このスキルは<color=#28d9ed>強撃</color>の攻撃判定になる。

true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 스타터 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 대상에게 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다. 해당 공격은 <color=#28d9ed>강격</color>으로 적용됩니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다. 해당 공격은 <color=#28d9ed>강격</color>으로 적용됩니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携起始效果</color>：攻击后，有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成无法解除的<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果，持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。该攻击造成<color=#28d9ed>强击</color>效果。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>：攻击后，有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率造成无法解除的<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果，持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。该攻击造成<color=#28d9ed>强击</color>效果。
